name: Grunkohlsuppe (Kale and Potato Soup)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Garlic Sausage, cooked and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and chop the potatoes.
2. Combine the chopped potatoes with vegetable oil and water in a pot.
3. Cook for 20 to 30 minutes or until the potatoes are tender.
4. Remove the potatoes from the pot and reserve the liquid.
5. Mash the remaining potatoes through a sieve and return them to the potato liquid.
6. Add salt and pepper, and simmer for 20 minutes.
7. Wash the kale and discard any tough leaves; cut into shreds.
8. Add the shredded kale to the soup and cook for an additional 25 minutes.
9. Add the cooked garlic sausage and simmer gently for 5 more minutes.
